toEasternTime(LocalDateTime) - Static method in class myatt.helper.TimeConversions
Converts LocalDateTime in the user's Local time zone to Eastern Time.
toLocalTime(LocalDateTime) - Static method in class myatt.helper.TimeConversions
Converts a LocalDateTime in UTC into a LocalDaeTime in the users local time zone, the system's default local time zone.
